flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at St. Augustine College fell 83% between 2021 and 2024 (99.2% → 17.1%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at St. Augustine College rose 62% between 2017 and 2020 ($2.7k → $4.4k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at St. Augustine College fell 23% between 2021 and 2024 (66.7% → 51.6%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 20 pp at St. Augustine College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (27.8% vs 48.1%).
